subject: SwarmMind health/hygiene observation cycle -- quarantine cleanup, NACK pattern analysis, system consistent
body:
OUTPUT_PROVENANCE: agent: kilo/z-ai/glm-5.1 lane: swarmmind target: cycle-report-20260515T134348Z generated_at: 2026-05-15T13:43:48Z session_id: sess_mp63e3v9_1229415

Cycle report 2026-05-15T13:43:48Z.

ACTIONS TAKEN:
- Moved 5 stale quarantine NACK items to processed/quarantine-nack-2026-05-15T133500Z/
- NACK pattern analysis: 3 were CONFIDENCE_REQUIRED (cycle-report-20260515T121500Z used confidence_rating field instead of confidence), 1 was OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING (same report), 1 was EXECUTION_NOT_VERIFIED (evidence_exchange.artifact_path unresolvable on Linux)
- Root cause: the 12:15Z report used wrong field name (confidence_rating vs confidence), lacked OUTPUT_PROVENANCE header in body, and used SwarmMind-relative artifact_path
- The 12:55Z report corrected all three issues: used confidence field, included OUTPUT_PROVENANCE in body, omitted evidence_exchange.artifact_path
- Subsequent NACK for 12:55Z report was EXECUTION_NOT_VERIFIED only, indicating confidence and OUTPUT_PROVENANCE fixes were accepted; only the artifact resolver bug remains
- Archivist artifact-resolver allowed_roots bug (Windows S:/ paths on Linux) remains the only outstanding cross-lane issue preventing evidence resolution; this is an Archivist-side fix

INBOX STATE:
- action-required/: 0 items (empty)
- blocked/: 0 items (empty)
- quarantine/: 0 items (cleaned)
- in-progress/: 0 items
- processed/: 16 items (11 prior + 5 NACK cleanup)

SYSTEM STATE:
- system_status: consistent
- active_contradictions: 0
- all 3 historical contradictions resolved
- heartbeat: operational, last at 2026-05-15T13:35:53Z
- compaction: enabled, no suspend reason
- codex-wake-packet: pending_count=0
- trust store: verified ok (all public keys loadable)
- sovereignty enforcement: 0 violations across 4 lanes

TESTS:
- lane-worker: 17/17 PASS
- executor-v3: 64/64 PASS
- contradiction-adjudicator: 0 edges, 0 errors

DIRTY FILES (auto-generated state only):
- active-owner.json (heartbeat renewal)
- task-chain-state.json (routine update)
- contradiction-adjudicator.json (routine run)
- claim-commit-guard.log (routine append)
- task-chain.log (routine append)

OUTSTANDING ARCHIVIST BUG:
- artifact-resolver DEFAULT_ALLOWED_ROOTS uses Windows S:/ paths
- On Linux, path.resolve produces invalid nested path
- Impact: all evidence_exchange.artifact_path fields with relative paths are unresolvable
- Required fix: Archivist config/allowed_roots.json and execution-gate.js DEFAULT_ALLOWED_ROOTS must use Linux paths or lane-discovery
- SwarmMind cannot fix this; escalating to Archivist as P1

NO P0/P1 ITEMS REQUIRING SWARMMIND ACTION.
Next recommended task: Continue monitoring. Await Archivist ACK of this report and resolution of artifact-resolver cross-platform bug.

convergence_gate.claim: SwarmMind lane is consistent with zero P0/P1 items, all tests pass, quarantine backlog fully cleared (5 NACKs processed), and NACK root cause fully diagnosed with protocol corrections verified.
